title: Parameters for Lidar Centerpoint Node
$comment: This schema is not considered in CI workflow due to a basename-prefix collision with sibling ml_package/common parameter files in this directory (see json-schema-check's glob matching in validate_json_schemas.py). See PR #12949 for details. Same pattern as centerpoint_common.schema.json's sibling, transfusion.schema.dummy.json.

encoder_engine_path.description: Path to VoxelFeatureEncoder TensorRT Engine file.

head_engine_path.description: Path to DetectionHead TensorRT Engine file.

cloud_capacity.description: Capacity of the point cloud buffer (should be set to at least the maximum theoretical number of points).

yaw_norm_thresholds.description: An array of distance threshold values of norm of yaw [rad].

iou_nms_search_distance_2d.description: A maximum distance value to search the nearest objects.

iou_nms_threshold.description: A threshold value of NMS using IoU score.

world_frame_id.description: A name of frame id where world coordinates system is defined with respect to.

num_past_frames.description: A number of past frames to be considered as same input frame.
